style_effects: Flickering translucent purple mist particles drift slowly around Butterfree's form, elongating shadows bending unnaturally in the air. A pale, cold blue-white aura pulses gently around its body with a faint, distorted reflection shimmering in the mist. The lighting mood is eerie and desolate, casting long, wavering shadows under a dim, moonlit sky. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
